approvals.scope: Read local skill sources, templates, examples, JSON fixtures, DOCX templates, PDF invoices, and workbook files supplied by the operator.
approvals.reason: The suite is local-first and must inspect user-provided diligence inputs and package fixtures.
approvals.target_enforcement: metadata-only; operator controls local file selection

approvals.scope: Write generated Markdown, XLSX, DOCX, JSON, and copied PDF archive artifacts to explicit output paths or package-local output/archive directories.
approvals.reason: Workbook, interview-note, and invoice-archive skills produce local files as their primary output contract.
approvals.target_enforcement: metadata-only; scripts require explicit paths or package-local output directories

approvals.scope: Run repository validation scripts and local document/workbook generation commands.
approvals.reason: The package validation path depends on local CLI checks and deterministic generation scripts.
approvals.target_enforcement: metadata-only; no remote inline execution is permitted
